hooks.command: node -e "const stdin=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'); const input=JSON.parse(stdin); const cmd=(input.tool_input&&input.tool_input.command)||''; if(/--no-verify|--no-gpg-sign/.test(cmd)){process.stderr.write('BLOCKED: Do not bypass git hooks or signing.\n');process.exit(2);}process.stdout.write(stdin);"

node -e "const stdin=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'); const input=JSON.parse(stdin); const fp=(input.tool_input&&input.tool_input.file_path)||''; if(/\.(ts|tsx)$/.test(fp) && !/node_modules|.next/.test(fp)){ const {execSync}=require('child_process'); try{ const out=execSync('npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -15',{encoding:'utf8',timeout:30000,cwd:process.env.HOME+'/PycharmProjects/kids_math'}); if(/error TS/.test(out)){process.stderr.write('TypeCheck warning after edit:
'+out+'
');}} catch(e){const msg=e.stdout||e.message||'';if(/error TS/.test(msg))process.stderr.write('TypeCheck warning:
'+msg.slice(0,500)+'
');}} process.stdout.write(stdin);"

PostToolUse.description: TypeScript check after editing .ts/.tsx files (warning only, non-blocking)

hooks.command:
node -e "const stdin=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'); const input=JSON.parse(stdin); const fp=(input.tool_input&&input.tool_input.file_path)||''; if(/\.(ts|tsx)$/.test(fp) && !/node_modules|.next|test/.test(fp)){ try{ const content=require('fs').readFileSync(fp,'utf8'); const lines=content.split('
'); const hits=[]; lines.forEach((l,i)=>{if(/console\.log/.test(l))hits.push('  line '+(i+1)+': '+l.trim());}); if(hits.length>0)process.stderr.write('WARNING: console.log found in '+fp+':
'+hits.join('
')+'
');} catch(e){}} process.stdout.write(stdin);"

PostToolUse.description: Warn about console.log in production .ts/.tsx files after edits

hooks.command: node -e "const stdin=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'); const input=JSON.parse(stdin); const fp=(input.tool_input&&input.tool_input.file_path)||''; const protected_patterns=['.eslintrc','.prettierrc','tsconfig.json','tailwind.config','next.config','playwright.config','vitest.config']; const isProtected=protected_patterns.some(p=>fp.includes(p)); if(isProtected){process.stderr.write('NOTE: You edited a config file ('+require('path').basename(fp)+'). Make sure this is intentional — prefer fixing code over weakening configs.\n');} process.stdout.write(stdin);"

PostToolUse.description: Warn when editing config files (eslint, tsconfig, etc.) — prefer fixing code over weakening configs

hooks.command:
node -e "const stdin=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'); const {execSync}=require('child_process'); try{ const diff=execSync('git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null',{encoding:'utf8',cwd:process.env.HOME+'/PycharmProjects/kids_math',timeout:5000}); const files=diff.trim().split('
').filter(f=>f&&/\.(ts|tsx)$/.test(f)&&!/test|spec/.test(f)); let issues=[]; files.forEach(f=>{ try{ const content=require('fs').readFileSync(require('path').join(process.env.HOME+'/PycharmProjects/kids_math',f),'utf8'); if(/console\.log/.test(content))issues.push(f+': has console.log'); if(/// *TODO|FIXME|HACK/.test(content)){const m=content.match(/// *(TODO|FIXME|HACK).*/g); if(m)issues.push(f+': '+m.length+' TODO/FIXME/HACK comment(s)');}} catch(e){}}); if(issues.length>0)process.stderr.write('
--- Pre-commit reminders ---
'+issues.join('
')+'
---
');} catch(e){} process.stdout.write(stdin);"

Stop.description: Scan modified files for console.log and TODO/FIXME before response ends
